title: 5000 Pieces Of Heart Shaped Biodegradable Confetti,(White, Pink, Rose, Red) 4 Colours Romance Wedding Confetti For Wedding, Valentines, Christmas, Anniversary,Birthday Table Decoration Paper Confetti
features: ❤️ 【Product Content】: This package contains approximately 5000 high-quality (White, Pink, Rose, Red) heart-shaped confetti, with a total weight of about 50 grams. These confetti pieces are perfect for various occasions, particularly weddings. They can be used during interactive sessions, sprinkled on the newlyweds to bring them full blessings and joy. Ideal for wedding confetti and other celebratory events.

❤️ 【Product Quality】: These confetti are made of biodegradable materials, ensuring each piece is clean, easy to disperse, and environmentally friendly. The biodegradable confetti can quickly decompose in the natural environment, making them a sustainable choice. At the wedding scene, they not only enhance the romantic atmosphere but also reflect a commitment to environmental care.

❤️ 【Beautiful Design】: The heart-shaped design of the confetti, combined with other decorations, creates a romantic and beautiful atmosphere, adding a touch of tenderness to any occasion. At weddings, these heart confetti seem to float through the air as messengers of love, adding a special sense of ceremony to the happy moment of the newlyweds.

❤️ 【Artistic Value】: With 4 colors of heart-shaped confetti, you can inspire endless creativity. They are perfect for creating various heart-shaped artworks and adding an artistic flavor to your activities. In wedding planning, these wedding confetti biodegradable pieces can be used to design unique background walls or decorations, making the wedding scene full of artistic sense and personalized elements.

❤️ 【Widely Applicable】: This product is versatile and suitable for special occasions such as gatherings, weddings, dinners, and anniversary celebrations. It can also be used as gift decorations or home embellishments to add a touch of fun to life. Whether it's the joyful confetti-throwing session at a wedding or a small surprise prepared for a loved one, these biodegradable confetti can become a beautiful carrier for conveying love and blessings.
description: Product description Package Includes: 5000 Pieces of Heart Shaped Biodegradable Confetti in White, Pink, Rose, and Red (4 Colors) Characteristics: Material: Paper (Biodegradable Confetti) Color: Assorted Color Heart Confetti (White, Pink, Rose, Red) Size: 2.50 x 2.50 x 0.05 cm (Creative Shape Confetti) Features: The heart confetti is made of paper, which is light, safe to use, and eco-friendly, making it perfect for table decoration. Applications: Ideal for various occasions including Valentine’s Day, weddings, bridal showers, birthdays, proposals, baby showers, and more. This heart-shaped confetti adds a romantic and sweet touch to any celebration. Usage: You can spread this biodegradable confetti on tables, table mats, or throw it into the air to enhance the festive atmosphere. It can also be used to fill balloons, or as a decorative element on invitation cards. Design: Features heart shapes and love alphabet designs, these confetti props create a romantic and sweet ambiance, making them perfect for wedding confetti, party decor, and more. Goods Information: Decorative Uses: Perfect for decorating party tables, invitations, cards, scrapbooks, DIY crafts, favor bags, baskets, and more. Special Features: This set of biodegradable heart confetti is designed to enhance the festive atmosphere of your event, adding a touch of charm and creativity. Safety Warning Do not aim at eyes or face.
